narrative:
Leesburg (precinct in Union County) has 993 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.7 percentage points.
